name: Axis Bank REWARDS Credit Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under Axis Bank REWARDS Credit Card terms
milestoneBenefits: 1,500 EDGE REWARD Points on net spends of Rs 30,000 per statement cycle
Annual fee waived on annual spends of Rs 2 lakh or more, excluding rent and wallet load transactions
additionalBenefits: 5,000 EDGE REWARD Points on cumulative net spends of Rs 1,000 or above within 30 days of card issuance
2 EDGE REWARD Points per Rs 125 on eligible spends
10X EDGE REWARD Points per Rs 125 on apparel and departmental store spends up to Rs 7,000 per month
Bouquet of memberships worth up to Rs 1,000 every anniversary year
Rs 150 instant discount on Swiggy twice per calendar month on minimum transaction value of Rs 500
2 complimentary domestic lounge visits per quarter at select airports
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel transactions

salaried: Eligibility is subject to Axis Bank approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to Axis Bank approval criteria
